nodes.label: URAP — Unified Revenue Acceleration Platform
nodes.author: Antigravity / Dabblin Cloud Technologies
nodes.rationale: Consolidates prospecting, contact enrichment, omni-channel outreach, and AI automation into one product to replace stacking Apollo, Kular, Instantly, and ClickPoint separately

nodes.label: urap-app — React + Vite Frontend Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Strict three-column layout based on Seamless.AI model; talks directly to urap-engine over HTTP with no SSR layer; tool registry drives all sidebar/routing to avoid hardcoded nav

nodes.label: urap-engine — Python FastAPI Microservice
nodes.rationale: All business logic centralized in one service so frontend and middleware plugin both proxy to it; Python 3.12 required due to pydantic 2.8 incompatibility with 3.14

nodes.label: @antigravity/urap-core — Express Middleware Plugin
nodes.rationale: Thin proxy layer so host sites can embed URAP without deploying a separate frontend; exposes lead capture and consent endpoints while keeping business logic solely in the engine

nodes.label: LeadStatusObject
nodes.rationale: Single shared state object flowing through every module ensures channel state machine can pause all channels on any reply event

nodes.label: Module I — Global Intelligence & Data Enrichment
nodes.norm_label: module i — global intelligence & data enrichment

nodes.label: Module IV — Inbound Lead Capture & Distribution
nodes.norm_label: module iv — inbound lead capture & distribution

nodes.label: Channel State Machine
nodes.rationale: Enforces global rule that any channel reply pauses all other channel tasks for that lead immediately

nodes.label: TCPA Consent Ledger
nodes.rationale: Insert-only ledger with no updates or deletes for TCPA compliance; TrustedForm cert URLs stored immutably

nodes.label: Tool Registry (registry.ts)
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth for sidebar and routing so adding a new tool requires only registering it here — no hardcoded nav changes

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant Design
nodes.rationale: Tenant isolation via Supabase RLS + x-tenant-id header allows one engine instance to serve multiple clients without separate deployments

nodes.label: Email Sender Waterfall (SMTP2GO → Brevo → Mailgun)
nodes.rationale: Waterfall of three free-tier email providers ensures reliable delivery without requiring a paid primary sender

nodes.label: URAP Icon Logo
nodes.rationale: Compact icon version of the URAP brand mark — stylized 'U' letterform with upward arrow and lightning bolt in lavender/purple and gold; intended for favicon, app icon, or small-format use

nodes.label: URAP Full Logo (Dark Background)
nodes.rationale: Full wordmark version: icon above full product name 'UNIFIED REVENUE ACCELERATION PLATFORM' and 'URAP' abbreviation on dark navy background; used for hero/splash/marketing contexts

nodes.label: urap-logo.png (in-app asset)
nodes.rationale: Same icon-only version bundled inside src/assets for use in the TopNav component of the React dashboard

hyperedges.label: AI Agent Pipeline: Warp Mode + Reply Intelligence
